John Chu, Esq. for and with the Plaintiff Lih Wdoan Lii.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-28-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
DEFENDANT MARTIN ENG'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH 5 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND TO ALLEGE COMPLIANCE WITH OR EXEMPTION FROM THE RENT ORDINANCE. Prevailing party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Paul H. Alvarado, Reporter: Joanne Farrell , CSR # 4838 (301/PHA)
